visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up shot of a hand with red nail polish holding a red package of noodles against a white kitchen background. The shot then cuts to a golden-brown pancake being fried in a black pan on a modern stovetop. (2) A variety of ingredients are presented on a clean white countertop, including a small bundle of thin white noodles, three brown eggs, and a white sachet labeled with Chinese characters. The lighting is bright and even. (3) The thin white noodles are placed into a black pot filled with boiling water. The water is bubbling vigorously, and steam is visible. A pair of wooden chopsticks is used to submerge the noodles completely. (4) In a blue and white patterned ceramic bowl, a hand cracks a brown egg. The yellow yolk and clear whites fall into the bowl alongside two previously cracked eggs. The camera remains at a close-up angle. (5) A liquid from a white sachet is poured into the bowl with the eggs. A pair of chopsticks is then used to whisk the eggs and liquid together with rapid circular motions until well combined. (6) The boiled white noodles are lifted out of the pot and placed directly into the bowl of beaten egg mixture. The noodles are then tossed with the chopsticks to ensure each strand is thoroughly coated in yellow liquid. (7) A white spray bottle is used to apply oil to the surface of a black non-stick frying pan. The pan is sitting on an induction cooktop. The lighting remains bright and natural. (8) The noodle and egg mixture is poured from the blue bowl into the heated pan. The mixture spreads out into a circular shape. Chopsticks are used to level the surface and distribute the noodles evenly across the pan. (9) A white silicone spatula is used to lift the edge of the pancake, checking for doneness. The pancake is then flipped over, revealing a crispy, golden-brown crust. The sound of sizzling is implied by the visual of small bubbles. (10) The final cooked pancake is presented on a dark brown plate placed on a light wood surface. Natural sunlight casts a soft shadow, and a digital emoji of a face with a tongue sticking out appears in the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 一起來煮. [Logo]: 余天宮. (2) [Subtitle]: 大人小孩都愛吃的. [Variety]: 麵線煎餅. (3) [Subtitle]: 準備兩捆麵線, 三顆蛋. [Variety]: 兩捆麵線. (4) [Subtitle]: 一包滴雞精. (5) [Variety]: 步驟一. [Subtitle]: 先把麵線煮熟. (6) [Variety]: 步驟二. [Subtitle]: 打蛋. (7) [Variety]: 步驟三. [Subtitle]: 加入滴雞精調味. (8) [Variety]: 步驟四. [Subtitle]: 把熟麵線跟蛋液攪拌均勻. (9) [Variety]: 步驟五. [Subtitle]: 攪拌均勻. (10) [Variety]: 步驟六. [Subtitle]: 熱鍋, 下油. (11) [Variety]: 步驟七. [Subtitle]: 下蛋液麵線. (12) [Variety]: 步驟八. [Subtitle]: 平均鋪平. (13) [Subtitle]: 兩面煎熟就完成啦. (14) [Emoji / Symbols]: 🤤

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One set of female hands with red nail polish is visible performing the cooking actions.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A female creator with manicured red nails, wearing a dark sleeve.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern domestic kitchen featuring a white marble or quartz countertop, a black induction stovetop, and white tiled walls. Utensils like chopsticks and a blue-and-white bowl are used.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A friendly female voice begins with a bright greeting, accompanied by an upbeat acoustic guitar track. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as the ingredients are shown. The music continues with a steady 4/4 beat. (3) Sound of bubbling water is heard briefly under the narration. (4) A crisp 'crack' sound marks the eggshell breaking, followed by another 'ding' transition effect. (5) The sound of a plastic packet tearing and liquid pouring is clearly audible, followed by the rapid rhythmic sound of chopsticks hitting a ceramic bowl during whisking. (6) A wet, squelching sound occurs as the noodles are mixed into the liquid egg base. (7) A high-pitched 'hiss' from an oil spray can is followed by a digital 'pop' sound effect. (8) A loud, continuous sizzling sound starts as the mixture is poured into the pan, dominating the mid-frequency range. (9) A metallic scraping sound from a spatula is followed by a distinct 'flip' sound and intensified sizzling. (10) The music swells in volume for a final presentation, ending with a celebratory 'ding' sound effect as the speech concludes.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Ingredients -> Step-by-Step Execution -> Result
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a clear and engaging step-by-step tutorial on how to make a Mee Sua pancake, emphasizing ease of cooking and the use of nutritional supplements like chicken essence.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear product placement of Yu Tian Gong noodles and Nong Chun Xiang chicken essence during the cooking process.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency sound effects to emphasize visual transitions, creating a satisfying 'ASMR-lite' cooking experience common in short-form food content.
